2283330.name: Military Battlefield: Enlisted
2283330.description:
Military Battlefield Is A Fps Shooter

The game is set in a realistic environment. You play as a soldier on either side of the conflict, and must use your shooting skills to defeat the enemy. The gameplay is fast-paced and intense, and you must be quick on your feet to survive. With a variety of different weapons and equipment to choose from, you can customize your loadout to suit your playstyle. Military Battlefield is a challenging and exciting FPS game that will keep you on your toes.
2283330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
